title: Anthropic 高管计划与美政府官员会面 讨论模型访问限制
content: Anthropic 高管计划周一与特朗普政府官员在美国商务部会面，讨论美国政府要求禁止外国人访问该公司最先进人工智能模型的指令，目前双方参会人员名单尚未明确。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 MCP 接入 Anthropic 高管计划周一与特朗普政府官员在美国商务部会面，讨论美国政府要求禁止外国人访问该公司最先进人工智能模型的指令，目前双方参会人员名单尚未明确。 报道：Anthropic 高管计划与美政府官员会面，讨论模型访问限制 华尔街见闻 Anthropic 高管与美政府展开谈判，寻求解除 AI 模型 Fable 5 出口禁令 IT 之家 2026-04-29 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 就高阶网络安全 AI 模型与美国众议院委员会展开会晤 2026-04-17 Anthropic 首席执行官将与白宫办公厅主任会面 2026-04-15 消息称美政府机构绕过特朗普禁令使用 Anthropic 模型 2026-04-14 Anthropic 称仍就 Mythos 模型与特朗普政府沟通 2026-03-27 Anthropic 赢得法院支持，阻止特朗普对其 AI 工具的使用禁令 2025-06-06 Anthropic 推出政府专用 AI 模型 涉足国家安全领域 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

title: 腾讯出资 2000 万美元入股阿里前明星研究员林俊旸的 AI 实验室
content: 腾讯控股已入股由阿里巴巴通义大模型前首席研究员林俊旸创立的全新人工智能实验室。该实验室首轮融资总规模达数亿美元，投后估值约 20 亿美元，腾讯出资 2000 万美元，此轮融资由高榕资本、红杉中国各出资 1 亿美元领投。本轮融资刚完成交割，林俊旸团队已着手筹备下一轮募资。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 MCP 接入 腾讯控股 已入股由 阿里巴巴 通义大模型 前首席研究员林俊旸创立的全新人工智能实验室。该实验室首轮融资总规模达数亿美元，投后估值约 20 亿美元，腾讯出资 2000 万美元，此轮融资由 高榕资本 、 红杉中国 各出资 1 亿美元领投。本轮融资刚完成交割，林俊旸团队已着手筹备下一轮募资。 腾讯投了林俊旸 1.4 亿！前千问负责人创业，估值 135 亿 华尔街见闻 / 创业邦 消息称腾讯出资 2000 万美元，入股阿里通义千问大模型前负责人林俊旸的 AI 实验室 IT 之家 2026-06-16 腾讯出资 2000 万美元入股阿里前明星研究员林俊旸的 AI 实验室 2026-05-13 前阿里千问技术负责人林俊旸开启创业：目标估值 20 亿美元 2026-03-11 微信秘密研发 AI Agent: 拟打通数百万小程序，将于 2026 年中开启测试 2026-01-29 阿里正考虑将未来三年投入到 AI 基建与云计算上的 3800 亿元提升至 4800 亿 2025-11-14 ​腾讯回应 AI 支出低于预期：GPU 足以满足内部需求 2025-08-29 吴泳铭：过去四个季度，阿里 AI 基础设施及 AI 产品研发累计投入超 1000 亿元 2025-08-13 腾讯控股：二季度资本开支付款人民币 229 亿元 主要用于 AI 相关业务发展 2025-07-27 腾讯副总裁蔡学忠：内部 30% 代码由人工智能编写 2025-07-27 腾讯多款 AI 产品亮相 WAIC 将披露机器人领域全新进展 2025-07-16 黄仁勋：DeepSeek、阿里、腾讯推动 AI 创新 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

summary: Tencent invested $20 million in an AI lab founded by Lin Junyang, former chief researcher of Alibaba's Tongyi large language model. The lab's first funding round totaled several hundred million dollars at a post-investment valuation of approximately $2 billion, led by Gaorong Capital and Sequoia China each contributing $100 million. The team is already preparing its next funding round.

title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
content: Anthropic opens Seoul and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem—with the enterprises, startups, and researchers behind some of the most ambitious deployments of Claude. Research Policy Commitments Learn News Try Claude Announcements Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem Jun 17, 2026 Our Seoul office is now open. Alongside it, we are announcing new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem—with the enterprises, startups, and researchers behind some of the most ambitious deployments of Claude. “What I see in Korea are teams who understand that innovation and safety are two sides of the same coin,” said KiYoung Choi, Representative Director of Korea at Anthropic. “Korean organizations are building with Claude to bring the benefits of AI to millions around the world. Opening an office in Seoul gives a long-term home to our work alongside the people shaping Korean leadership in AI.” This week, senior leaders from Anthropic traveled to Seoul to open the office and meet with partners, customers, and developers building with Claude. From WRTN to Law&Company , Korean organizations have been working with Claude for years. Today, we are sharing new examples of how Claude is running across the Korean economy. Some of the deepest adoption is happening among developers. NAVER, a leader in cloud and AI innovation in Asia, has recently deployed Claude Code across its entire engineering organization. Thousands of NAVER engineers are now using Claude Code to diversify their coding tools and maximize coding productivit

summary: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp is a high-performance code intelligence MCP server that indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph. It processes average repositories in milliseconds, supports 158 languages, delivers sub-millisecond queries, and reduces token usage by 99%. The tool is distributed as a single static binary with zero dependencies. Written in C, the project has 4,104 stars and 420 forks.

title: Parallelize speculative decoding with P-EAGLE on Amazon SageMaker AI
content: This post walks you through how to use P-EAGLE directly within Amazon SageMaker AI. It will demonstrate how to select a compatible model from the SageMaker JumpStart catalog, configure the parallel drafting specifications, and deploy a highly optimized real-time SageMaker AI endpoint to accelerate your generative AI applications. Artificial Intelligence Parallelize speculative decoding with P-EAGLE on Amazon SageMaker AI by Andy Peng , Daniel Quang , Dan Ferguson , and Siddharth Shah on 16 JUN 2026 in Advanced (300) , Amazon SageMaker AI , Technical How-to Permalink Share As large language models (LLMs) grow in size and complexity, maximizing inference throughput while minimizing latency remains a critical challenge for enterprise production deployments. Speculative decoding is one effective strategy to address this, utilizing a lightweight draft model to guess future tokens which are then verified by the target LLM in a single forward pass. While state-of-the-art frameworks like Extrapolation Algorithm for Greater Language-model Efficiency (EAGLE) have achieved impressive speedups, they encounter a hidden architectural ceiling: their draft tokens are generated autoregressively. Because each draft token depends on the output of the previous one, producing K candidates requires K sequential forward passes through the draft head, creating a latency cost that grows linearly with speculation depth. EAGLE-3, the latest iteration, improved upon earlier versions by predicting tokens directly rather than features and by combining representations from multiple layers of the target m
